chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Transfer Application No.S- 52 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case. Miss Irshad Nawaz Kalwar, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G for the State. Date of Hearing & Order: 13-11-2023 O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J.- With the consent, this Crl. Transfer Application is allowed. Crl. Appeal No. 07 of 2022 re: Abdul Qayyoom v. The State, arising out of Crime No.77 of 2020, registered at P.S, Adilpur for offences under Sections 489-F & 506/2 PPC is withdrawn from the file of learned Additional Sessions Judge-1, Mirpur Mathelo and transferred to the Court of learned Additional Sessions Judge-II, Mirpur Mathelo for its disposal in accordance with law. This Crl. Transfer Application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE Ahmad
